title: 1bit-stream /v1/catalogs index response
description: JSON Schema for the response body of `GET /v1/catalogs` on a 1bit-stream server. An array of catalog summaries derived from the `.1bl` manifests served by that host.
$comment: Schema file license: CC BY 4.0. Summary row fields mirror the relevant subset of docs/schemas/1bl-manifest.schema.json.

slug.description: Catalog slug — matches `catalog` in the manifest.

tier.description: Which tiers the server has available for this catalog.

cover_url.description: Absolute URL to the cover artwork, or null if the catalog ships without a COVER section.

sha256.description: Lowercase hex SHA-256 of the `.1bl` container footer — uniquely identifies this build of the catalog.
